message:
Add Codex session parser with tests

Implements parseCodexSessionFile, extractCodexMetadata, and
buildCodexMessages for converting Codex CLI JSONL sessions into the
existing ParsedMessage format. Handles function_call/custom_tool_call
tool patterns, reasoning summaries, and system context filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
